title: Giant Dead Oak Tree
description: This simple mod adds a giant dead oak tree to the forest and badlands biome.
body:
### Giant Dead Oak Tree

**This simple mod adds a giant dead oak tree to the forest and badlands biome.**
![Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38472fb805d225f6b27e16920e33dc69e628bdcf.jpeg)


- The terrain around the dead tree is designed to blend naturally with the biome.
- Perfect spot to build a base nearby
  
Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
